AssumeRoleDataSources.description: Data sources that upload to the landing zone by assuming a cross-account role (no long-lived access key). Map keyed by organization name. Fields per entry: - TrustedPrincipalArns: AWS principal ARNs allowed to assume the role - ExternalId: external ID agreed with the team, required in the role trust policy - Colors: (Optional) confidentiality colors to grant upload prefixes for (defaults to green, yellow and red)

Catalogues.description: List of databricks catalogues to create. Each catalogue will be created as a separate Terraform module. The catalog naming convention will be: {Org}_{Env}_{Confidentiality} (e.g., "myteam_dev_green") for standard catalogs or {Org}_{Env}_utils for the utils catalog. Fields: - Org: The organization or team name for the catalog - Env: The environment (e.g., dev, test, prod) - CatalogType: (Optional) Catalog type. Use "standard" (default) or "utils" for the shared utils catalog - Confidentiality: The data confidentiality level (e.g., green, yellow, red). Required unless CatalogType is "utils" - Comment: (Optional) A description for the catalog - ExtraSchemas: (Optional) List of additional schema names to create in the catalog - ExtraSchemasComment: (Optional) A comment for the extra schemas

DataSources.description: Data sources to grant landing zone access to via IAM user access keys. Use for organizations that cannot assume a cross-account role.

Databricks.description: Core Databricks workspace settings.  Fields: - AccountID: Your Databricks account ID - AdminUserEmail: Email of the workspace admin user - Org: Organization or team identifier used for naming resources - WorkspaceName: Name of the Databricks workspace

IncludeLandingZone.description: Include the Databricks landing zone module.

LandingZoneAccessGrants.description:
Access grants for the landing zone module. Each entry has:
- id: identifier for the grant
- privileges: list of privilege strings

S3EnforceSecureTransport.description: Require HTTPS for all requests to S3 buckets created by this template.

TerraformVersion.description: The version of Terraform to use.
